extortion.description: LaRosa’s Pizzeria is a family-owned pizza restaurant chain founded in 1954 by Donald “Buddy” LaRosa in Cincinnati, Ohio. Known for its signature thin-crust pizzas made with Aunt Dena’s original sauce recipe, the company has become a regional favorite across Ohio, Kentucky, and Indiana. LaRosa’s offers a wide variety of Italian-inspired dishes including pasta, hoagies, and salads. The brand emphasizes family traditions, community values, and quality ingredients. Still operated by the LaRosa family, it continues to represent the spirit of local hospitality and authentic Italian-American cuisine after more than 70 years in business.company is headquartered in 2334 Boudinot Avenue, Cincinnati, OH 45238, United States.
